notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the python3 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 9 CVEs: CVE-2007-4559, CVE-2020-10735, CVE-2021-28861, CVE-2022-45061, CVE-2022-48560, and 4 more.
